TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Latvia, title = Latvia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latvia} }

S.FORM: == Latoweya == zyuwaw na kinbkisan gleng nqu konying cyugal seng kawas hhazi.squliq nqu Latoweya na kinbkisan cintqalang maki sasyaw nqu umi Poloti te htgan wagi. gleng nqu konying mqeru kbhul kawas.mpira ini ptnaq nqu Polotihay citqalang maki sa Latoweya squliq nqu Keloni,squliq nqu Saymecya,squliq nqu Latecyalin,squliq nqu Seloniya(ke nqu Latoweya: kurši, zemgaļi, latgaļi, sēļi)ru kmal qara nqu Fenlang.squliq nqu Liwoniya.squliq nqu Polotihay.psrux sa sraral nqu Roma na msyobay.sagal nha sa pinhtuw nqu rhyal nha Huwpo pzyugun nha sa hmit iyal bzirun nqu kin. Sezi Koka nqu Latoweya psrux sa picyagan ga qutux nanak pspung na Latoweya Ihwe kya qutux kbhul cintman.mpayat kawas ga pwah sa minsyu mtxal psenkyo.soto na Latoweyapwah sa Ihwe senkyoga mhtuw. mpayat kawas ga mmtxal senkyo.sot ptke thoki nqu koka Latoweya ru llamu nqu psmsun zyuwaw na squliq ru magal sa Ihwe nqu psnhi nqu pinspngan.psmsun zyuwaw nqu sefu ga thoki ki linhoyan nquvpspung .yang qani nqu pinsrux nqu sezi ga te sazing pintriqan nqu cinbwanan lga mhtuw lamaki sa koka nqu Latoweya.kawas sazing seng ru mtzyu ru mopuw byacing ryax mpitu.Ihwe na sekyo nqu pintzyuwaw.minsyutan qutux kbhul nqu cintman ga magal mtzyul cyugal cintman. Lizen ru Nunmin magal mopuw mspat cintman.giqas ziray tan magal mopuw mspat cintman .Hesyecunzen magal mopuw mpitu cintma. Latoweya te qutux tan/ Latoweya tuqi linhoyan msenkyo,puqing ki zizyu linhoyan,msqutux nqu squliq na Latoweya squliq nqu kenlitan magal mopuw cintman,magal mspat cintman ru magal mtzyu cintman .minsyutan,litan ru Nogyo linhoyan,Latoweya te qutux tan/ Latoweya tuqi linhoyan ru Cuko ki zizyu linhoyan psrux mkrraw nqu sefu.Aycyarls.karlwetissi si nya rasi mthoki kawas sazing seng ru mpitu kawas mgal byaing mtzyul ryax Ihwe msenkyo soto.Cyarlcis.Catelayrls magal soto.maki sa te mopuw cyugal nqu Ihwe kaygi.(kawas sazing seng ru mopuw spat kawas)kya giqas nqu Pawsotan(magal mopuw mtzyu cintman mitxal mzyup sa Ihwe),Facantan(magal mopuw cyugal cintman .mitxal mzyup sa Ihwe),mincu linhoyan(magal mopuw sazing cintman)msqutux linhoyan,spyang hantay tan ru Hesetan(mpusal sazing cintman). kawas sazing seng ru mqeru ru mpitu byacing qutux ryax. koka nqu Latoweya mqasu mqeru hopa nqu qalang(ke nqu Latoweya: pilsēta)qutux kbhul ru mqeru nqu qalang(novads).kawas sazing seng ru mpusal ru mtzyu byacing mopuw ryax. Swalan nqu Latoweya na Ihwe mha qalng nqu pkgiqas nqu zyuwaw.qutux kbhul ru mopouw nqu qalang ru mqeru na hopa qalang blequn nha mwazyaw qu mmatul sazing nqu qalang sefu la.mtzyul magal ga qalang ru mpitu ga koka nqu hopa qalang .kawas sazing seng ru mpusal qutux mtzyu byacing qutux ryax. Latoweya gaga nqu hoin pinspngan nha maqalng nqu Walakeliya ni msqun ki Leckezit qalang hmiriq gaga.Nanu yasa Latoweya Ihwe pinspngan th'yan Walakeliya qalang te mpatul cyugal nqu qalang sefu. Tili/kian koka nqu Latoweya maki Polotihay nqu htgan wagi.maki sa Tungo b'nux.gluw nqu Peo.kura ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa Aysaniya.kura mkilux ga 'mubuy sa Litawwan.te htgan wagi ga 'mubuy 'Ros.te htgan wagi ki kura mkilux ga 'mubuy sa mplquy 'Ros.qes nqu koka qinryuzyux nya ga qutux seng mspat kbhul mtzyu pgan sazing kongli syaw nqu umi gaqinryuhan nya ga magal kbhul mtzyul qutux kongli.kwara qu qinryuxan ga mkrroq.heking kinwagiq ga mspat pgan mpitumi.mqasu maha mpayat ga cyugal ga maki sa qutux kbhul mpusal mi kinwiqan.kinnita ga mkrroq nqu rhyal.(htgan wagi ru byaqan wagi)ru b'nux.spyang nqu llyung ga kya Tawcyawa, llyung nqu Liyelupe,ru llyung nqu Keya. Gaga nqu qinnxan koka nqu Latoweya gaga nqu qinnxan ru zyaw nqu kinbkisan pinqsyugan ga zmagal gaga qinnxan nqu qalang:Kurllang,Semicyaliya,Wezme,Sayloniya ru Latecyarl.qutux qutux qalang gaga nqu qinnxan nqu ke ga,gaga na qinnhan ru iniptnaq qu mnanak nya.zizyu nqu kining pinsrux mcyugal nqu bbiru iyat giwan koka nqu Latoweya gaga nqu qinnxan qalang qani ga cyugal qalang msqun ru msqutux mrraw msinqutux mbuci nqu Latoweya linhoyan nqu koka.qani ga squliq nqu Latoweya ru squliq nqu Liwoniyaz cinqalang nqu rhyal.maki sa 'Rostiko na teska wayal nha mqsyugang mtbuci nqu qalang:qalang Kurllang,qalang Wezeme ru qalang Wecyepuske.kska ga qalang Kurllang lmahang Kurllang.Semicyaliya ru Zayloniya；qalang Wezeme lmahang Wezeme(kinhangan nya ga qalang Aysaniya kura mkilux nqu qalang)；qalang Wecyepuske lmahang Latecyarl. qalang Wecyepuske nqu Latoweya ki Wezme qalang na Latoweya msqun sa Kurlzme na qalang.psrux sa linhoyan nqu Latoweya koka.qalang nqu hopa Cyali ga aki puqing ga gluw nqu qalang Wezme.aring squ te sazing babaw pintriqan nqu sa cinbwanan lga ru mhelow na Maci qu qinnxan lru qalang Licya ru bih nqu qalang wayal mzyu sa binah nqu kin Wezme na llamu nqu mtbuci nqu qalang ini balay ptnaq la. pincbaq Koka nqu Latoweya kya mtzyul qu wagiq nqu pqwasan biru.kska nya ga mtzyu ga mqbaq sa kinraral nqu raygaq wagiq na pqwasan biru.kska nya ga sazing ga sefu nyux psrux nqu pqwasan.Latoweya"wagiq nqu pqwasan biru na pintzyaw nqu gaga "te mpitu pinspung.nanak Latoweya pqwasan nqu kisat(wayal laxan)ru Latoweya nqu kofang siyeyung kya qu koka na wagiq nqu pqwasan biru na nintman nha.binah nqu pqwasan biru lga"minposa nqu koli na pqwasan biru la." (kya hazi squliq pinsqunan nqu koka psrux pqwasan biru qani).koka nqu Latoweya qani ga spyang hopa nqu raygaq ga Latoweya na raygaq.mqwas hopa nqu pqwasan ga maki qnabuw nya.ana ga koka qani ga tkahul nya sa kekaq nya msina magal sa pila i mqwas biru.nanu yasa maki pinspung nya pira mqwas biru ga maki sqani mqwas."kian nqupin kesan預算地方"ini biqi pila mqbaq.baha hmswa ga wagiq nqu pqwasan biru ga maki sa psmsun nqu zyuwaw ga maki nanak qu kenli nha smpung pila.nanu yasa pbiq pila.qnabu nqu pila.pinthan nqu sinsi ga wagiq nqu pintzyaw nqu thoki pspung kwara. nniqun koka nqu Latoweya blaq qu nniqun qani ga kahul Nogyo msqutux linhoyan.spyang nniqun nha ga llamu nqu hi.nyux maki sa syaw nqu Potihay qu koka nqu Latoweya.nanu yasa ga qqulih ga nniqun nha krryax. koka nqu Latoweya nniqun nha ga baha hmswa ga slaxan nqu lingay nqu koka yang 'Ros,Litawwan nqu koka. Latoweya nniqun minnrwan nha ka.biru nqu ktan ga ktan kryax nqu rramat ga bqun'lwaw yang ngihi Gipun,cipoq mugi,hopa mugi,hopa nqu ramat Pay,Tmago,bazing| ru hi syam. koka nqu Latoweya nqu nniqun krryax ga qprih ga wagiq balay ru cipoq qu ckaw nha ssokan.Balit ru kinnalay nqu Hwotwe spyang nniqun squliq nqu Latoweya. squliq nqu Latoweya ga mnbu squ ayang nqu Swanme(ke nqu Ego ga:Sorrel soup)."Rupjmaize"qutux ga kinnalay nqu mqalux nqu mugi mqalux nqu Mepaw. Spyang niqun nq koka nqu Latoweya.squliq nqu Latoweya ga mnbu nqu puqing Biru. Biru qani ga squliq nqu Latoweya spyang nbun nha qwo.hopa qalang ga Licya kahul sazing .kawas sazing seng ru mopuw qutuxtaring maki sa magal byacing tmsuqan ptzyaw qutux kawas minqutux"sinqqas Latoweya nqu Biru na ryax".Latoweya nqu Biru na ryax kahul binah nqu koka ru smoya mnbu Biru nqu squliq mwah m'utu' sqani.kahul ana inu nqu cinbwanan nqu mopuw msyaw nqu koba na Biru. Cingay balay nqu squliq mwah mzuy sqani.Licyahesyangz(ke nqu Latoweya:Rīgas Melnais balzams)qani ga Latoweya nqu qutux puqing nqu llamu na qwo na nnbun minhtuw sa spyang gleng ga misu na qutux seng kawas mpitu kbhul mzimal sazing. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu koka binah Cun hwa min ko maki sa qutux seng mqeru kbhul mtzyu mtzyu min psrux squ koka nqu Latoweya kintke ga tehuk sa Kons nqu psmsun zyuwaw minsblaq ana ga taring sa babaw nqu kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mpatul lga Latoweya qani ga qolang nqu Sulin nanu yasa tmasoq qu sazing koka na pisrangi la kwas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mpatul mqeru pgan qutux lga koka nqu Latoweya qani ga msblaq ki Cun hwa zen min linhoyan nqu koka la.Cun hwa min ko min naki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan sazing tehuk kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mpayat ki koka nqu Latoweya psrux Cun Lin se nqu pisrangi.banaw nqu tmasoq qu pisrangi.sazing koka qani ga ana wayal mtalax ga. Nyux si klokah smru'yang nqu smka na sefu msblaq mppkal mrraw . .Cun hwa min ko maki sa qalang Cyali psrux sa koka nqu Latoweya qani ga Taype rayhyo nqu lonhoyan.baha hmswa ga zywaw nqu Sulin qani ga .koka nqu Latoweya qani ga yaqih nya qu Sulin hmiriq gaga' koka nqu Latoweya mluw sa Omon blaq balay qu pincyagan nha ki 'Ros.ana gasinblayan nqu hetay ga stama sa Peye ki Amerika. Latvia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 57 00 N, 25 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 64,589 sq km (maki' tay 124ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 62,249 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,340 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,965,686. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 29.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 54.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 16.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Riga. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Raimonds Vējonis, aring ryax 8 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

== Latoweya == zyuwaw na kinbkisan gleng nqu konying cyugal seng kawas hhazi.squliq nqu Latoweya na kinbkisan cintqalang maki sasyaw nqu umi Poloti te htgan wagi. gleng nqu konying mqeru kbhul kawas.mpira ini ptnaq nqu Polotihay citqalang maki sa Latoweya squliq nqu Keloni,squliq nqu Saymecya,squliq nqu Latecyalin,squliq nqu Seloniya(ke nqu Latoweya: kurši, zemgaļi, latgaļi, sēļi)ru kmal qara nqu Fenlang.squliq nqu Liwoniya.squliq nqu Polotihay.psrux sa sraral nqu Roma na msyobay.sagal nha sa pinhtuw nqu rhyal nha Huwpo pzyugun nha sa hmit iyal bzirun nqu kin. Sezi Koka nqu Latoweya psrux sa picyagan ga qutux nanak pspung na Latoweya Ihwe kya qutux kbhul cintman.mpayat kawas ga pwah sa minsyu mtxal psenkyo.soto na Latoweyapwah sa Ihwe senkyoga mhtuw. mpayat kawas ga mmtxal senkyo.sot ptke thoki nqu koka Latoweya ru llamu nqu psmsun zyuwaw na squliq ru magal sa Ihwe nqu psnhi nqu pinspngan.psmsun zyuwaw nqu sefu ga thoki ki linhoyan nquvpspung .yang qani nqu pinsrux nqu sezi ga te sazing pintriqan nqu cinbwanan lga mhtuw lamaki sa koka nqu Latoweya.kawas sazing seng ru mtzyu ru mopuw byacing ryax mpitu.Ihwe na sekyo nqu pintzyuwaw.minsyutan qutux kbhul nqu cintman ga magal mtzyul cyugal cintman. Lizen ru Nunmin magal mopuw mspat cintman.giqas ziray tan magal mopuw mspat cintman .Hesyecunzen magal mopuw mpitu cintma. Latoweya te qutux tan/ Latoweya tuqi linhoyan msenkyo,puqing ki zizyu linhoyan,msqutux nqu squliq na Latoweya squliq nqu kenlitan magal mopuw cintman,magal mspat cintman ru magal mtzyu cintman .minsyutan,litan ru Nogyo linhoyan,Latoweya te qutux tan/ Latoweya tuqi linhoyan ru Cuko ki zizyu linhoyan psrux mkrraw nqu sefu.Aycyarls.karlwetissi si nya rasi mthoki kawas sazing seng ru mpitu kawas mgal byaing mtzyul ryax Ihwe msenkyo soto.Cyarlcis.Catelayrls magal soto.maki sa te mopuw cyugal nqu Ihwe kaygi.(kawas sazing seng ru mopuw spat kawas)kya giqas nqu Pawsotan(magal mopuw mtzyu cintman mitxal mzyup sa Ihwe),Facantan(magal mopuw cyugal cintman .mitxal mzyup sa Ihwe),mincu linhoyan(magal mopuw sazing cintman)msqutux linhoyan,spyang hantay tan ru Hesetan(mpusal sazing cintman). kawas sazing seng ru mqeru ru mpitu byacing qutux ryax. koka nqu Latoweya mqasu mqeru hopa nqu qalang(ke nqu Latoweya: pilsēta)qutux kbhul ru mqeru nqu qalang(novads).kawas sazing seng ru mpusal ru mtzyu byacing mopuw ryax. Swalan nqu Latoweya na Ihwe mha qalng nqu pkgiqas nqu zyuwaw.qutux kbhul ru mopouw nqu qalang ru mqeru na hopa qalang blequn nha mwazyaw qu mmatul sazing nqu qalang sefu la.mtzyul magal ga qalang ru mpitu ga koka nqu hopa qalang .kawas sazing seng ru mpusal qutux mtzyu byacing qutux ryax. Latoweya gaga nqu hoin pinspngan nha maqalng nqu Walakeliya ni msqun ki Leckezit qalang hmiriq gaga.Nanu yasa Latoweya Ihwe pinspngan th'yan Walakeliya qalang te mpatul cyugal nqu qalang sefu. Tili/kian koka nqu Latoweya maki Polotihay nqu htgan wagi.maki sa Tungo b'nux.gluw nqu Peo.kura ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa Aysaniya.kura mkilux ga 'mubuy sa Litawwan.te htgan wagi ga 'mubuy 'Ros.te htgan wagi ki kura mkilux ga 'mubuy sa mplquy 'Ros.qes nqu koka qinryuzyux nya ga qutux seng mspat kbhul mtzyu pgan sazing kongli syaw nqu umi gaqinryuhan nya ga magal kbhul mtzyul qutux kongli.kwara qu qinryuxan ga mkrroq.heking kinwagiq ga mspat pgan mpitumi.mqasu maha mpayat ga cyugal ga maki sa qutux kbhul mpusal mi kinwiqan.kinnita ga mkrroq nqu rhyal.(htgan wagi ru byaqan wagi)ru b'nux.spyang nqu llyung ga kya Tawcyawa, llyung nqu Liyelupe,ru llyung nqu Keya. Gaga nqu qinnxan koka nqu Latoweya gaga nqu qinnxan ru zyaw nqu kinbkisan pinqsyugan ga zmagal gaga qinnxan nqu qalang:Kurllang,Semicyaliya,Wezme,Sayloniya ru Latecyarl.qutux qutux qalang gaga nqu qinnxan nqu ke ga,gaga na qinnhan ru iniptnaq qu mnanak nya.zizyu nqu kining pinsrux mcyugal nqu bbiru iyat giwan koka nqu Latoweya gaga nqu qinnxan qalang qani ga cyugal qalang msqun ru msqutux mrraw msinqutux mbuci nqu Latoweya linhoyan nqu koka.qani ga squliq nqu Latoweya ru squliq nqu Liwoniyaz cinqalang nqu rhyal.maki sa 'Rostiko na teska wayal nha mqsyugang mtbuci nqu qalang:qalang Kurllang,qalang Wezeme ru qalang Wecyepuske.kska ga qalang Kurllang lmahang Kurllang.Semicyaliya ru Zayloniya；qalang Wezeme lmahang Wezeme(kinhangan nya ga qalang Aysaniya kura mkilux nqu qalang)；qalang Wecyepuske lmahang Latecyarl. qalang Wecyepuske nqu Latoweya ki Wezme qalang na Latoweya msqun sa Kurlzme na qalang.psrux sa linhoyan nqu Latoweya koka.qalang nqu hopa Cyali ga aki puqing ga gluw nqu qalang Wezme.aring squ te sazing babaw pintriqan nqu sa cinbwanan lga ru mhelow na Maci qu qinnxan lru qalang Licya ru bih nqu qalang wayal mzyu sa binah nqu kin Wezme na llamu nqu mtbuci nqu qalang ini balay ptnaq la. pincbaq Koka nqu Latoweya kya mtzyul qu wagiq nqu pqwasan biru.kska nya ga mtzyu ga mqbaq sa kinraral nqu raygaq wagiq na pqwasan biru.kska nya ga sazing ga sefu nyux psrux nqu pqwasan.Latoweya"wagiq nqu pqwasan biru na pintzyaw nqu gaga "te mpitu pinspung.nanak Latoweya pqwasan nqu kisat(wayal laxan)ru Latoweya nqu kofang siyeyung kya qu koka na wagiq nqu pqwasan biru na nintman nha.binah nqu pqwasan biru lga"minposa nqu koli na pqwasan biru la." (kya hazi squliq pinsqunan nqu koka psrux pqwasan biru qani).koka nqu Latoweya qani ga spyang hopa nqu raygaq ga Latoweya na raygaq.mqwas hopa nqu pqwasan ga maki qnabuw nya.ana ga koka qani ga tkahul nya sa kekaq nya msina magal sa pila i mqwas biru.nanu yasa maki pinspung nya pira mqwas biru ga maki sqani mqwas."kian nqupin kesan預算地方"ini biqi pila mqbaq.baha hmswa ga wagiq nqu pqwasan biru ga maki sa psmsun nqu zyuwaw ga maki nanak qu kenli nha smpung pila.nanu yasa pbiq pila.qnabu nqu pila.pinthan nqu sinsi ga wagiq nqu pintzyaw nqu thoki pspung kwara. nniqun koka nqu Latoweya blaq qu nniqun qani ga kahul Nogyo msqutux linhoyan.spyang nniqun nha ga llamu nqu hi.nyux maki sa syaw nqu Potihay qu koka nqu Latoweya.nanu yasa ga qqulih ga nniqun nha krryax. koka nqu Latoweya nniqun nha ga baha hmswa ga slaxan nqu lingay nqu koka yang 'Ros,Litawwan nqu koka. Latoweya nniqun minnrwan nha ka.biru nqu ktan ga ktan kryax nqu rramat ga bqun'lwaw yang ngihi Gipun,cipoq mugi,hopa mugi,hopa nqu ramat Pay,Tmago,bazing| ru hi syam. koka nqu Latoweya nqu nniqun krryax ga qprih ga wagiq balay ru cipoq qu ckaw nha ssokan.Balit ru kinnalay nqu Hwotwe spyang nniqun squliq nqu Latoweya. squliq nqu Latoweya ga mnbu squ ayang nqu Swanme(ke nqu Ego ga:Sorrel soup)."Rupjmaize"qutux ga kinnalay nqu mqalux nqu mugi mqalux nqu Mepaw. Spyang niqun nq koka nqu Latoweya.squliq nqu Latoweya ga mnbu nqu puqing Biru. Biru qani ga squliq nqu Latoweya spyang nbun nha qwo.hopa qalang ga Licya kahul sazing .kawas sazing seng ru mopuw qutuxtaring maki sa magal byacing tmsuqan ptzyaw qutux kawas minqutux"sinqqas Latoweya nqu Biru na ryax".Latoweya nqu Biru na ryax kahul binah nqu koka ru smoya mnbu Biru nqu squliq mwah m'utu' sqani.kahul ana inu nqu cinbwanan nqu mopuw msyaw nqu koba na Biru. Cingay balay nqu squliq mwah mzuy sqani.Licyahesyangz(ke nqu Latoweya:Rīgas Melnais balzams)qani ga Latoweya nqu qutux puqing nqu llamu na qwo na nnbun minhtuw sa spyang gleng ga misu na qutux seng kawas mpitu kbhul mzimal sazing. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu koka binah Cun hwa min ko maki sa qutux seng mqeru kbhul mtzyu mtzyu min psrux squ koka nqu Latoweya kintke ga tehuk sa Kons nqu psmsun zyuwaw minsblaq ana ga taring sa babaw nqu kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mpatul lga Latoweya qani ga qolang nqu Sulin nanu yasa tmasoq qu sazing koka na pisrangi la kwas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mpatul mqeru pgan qutux lga koka nqu Latoweya qani ga msblaq ki Cun hwa zen min linhoyan nqu koka la.Cun hwa min ko min naki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan sazing tehuk kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mpayat ki koka nqu Latoweya psrux Cun Lin se nqu pisrangi.banaw nqu tmasoq qu pisrangi.sazing koka qani ga ana wayal mtalax ga. Nyux si klokah smru'yang nqu smka na sefu msblaq mppkal mrraw . .Cun hwa min ko maki sa qalang Cyali psrux sa koka nqu Latoweya qani ga Taype rayhyo nqu lonhoyan.baha hmswa ga zywaw nqu Sulin qani ga .koka nqu Latoweya qani ga yaqih nya qu Sulin hmiriq gaga' koka nqu Latoweya mluw sa Omon blaq balay qu pincyagan nha ki 'Ros.ana gasinblayan nqu hetay ga stama sa Peye ki Amerika. Latvia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 57 00 N, 25 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 64,589 sq km (maki' tay 124ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 62,249 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,340 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,965,686. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 29.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 54.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 16.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Riga. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Raimonds Vējonis, aring ryax 8 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: == latoweja == zjuwaw na kinβkis~ɕan ɣleŋ nqu konjiŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ ħħazi.s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja na kinβkis~ɕan ʦ~ʨintqalaŋ maki s~ɕas~ɕjaw nqu umi poloti te ħtɣan waɣi. ɣleŋ nqu konjiŋ mqeru kβħul kawas~ɕ.mpira ini ptnaq nqu polotiħaj ʦ~ʨitqalaŋ maki s~ɕa latoweja s~ɕquliq nqu keloni,s~ɕquliq nqu s~ɕajmeʦ~ʨja,s~ɕquliq nqu lateʦ~ʨjalin,s~ɕquliq nqu s~ɕelonija(ke nqu latoweja: kur*i, zemɣa*i, latɣa*i, s~ɕ**i)ru kmal qara nqu *enlaŋ.s~ɕquliq nqu liwonija.s~ɕquliq nqu polotiħaj.ps~ɕrux s~ɕa s~ɕraral nqu roma na ms~ɕjoβaj.s~ɕaɣal nħa s~ɕa pinħtuw nqu rħjal nħa ħuwpo pzjuɣun nħa s~ɕa ħmit ijal βzirun nqu kin. s~ɕezi koka nqu latoweja ps~ɕrux s~ɕa piʦ~ʨjaɣan ɣa qutux nanak ps~ɕpuŋ na latoweja iħwe kja qutux kβħul ʦ~ʨintman.mpajat kawas~ɕ ɣa pwaħ s~ɕa mins~ɕju mtxal ps~ɕenkjo.s~ɕoto na latowejapwaħ s~ɕa iħwe s~ɕenkjoɣa mħtuw. mpajat kawas~ɕ ɣa mmtxal s~ɕenkjo.s~ɕot ptke tħoki nqu koka latoweja ru llamu nqu ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw na s~ɕquliq ru maɣal s~ɕa iħwe nqu ps~ɕnħi nqu pins~ɕpŋan.ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu s~ɕe*u ɣa tħoki ki linħojan nqu*ps~ɕpuŋ .jaŋ qani nqu pins~ɕrux nqu s~ɕezi ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ pintriqan nqu ʦ~ʨinβwanan lɣa mħtuw lamaki s~ɕa koka nqu latoweja.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mtzju ru mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ rjax mpitu.iħwe na s~ɕekjo nqu pintzjuwaw.mins~ɕjutan qutux kβħul nqu ʦ~ʨintman ɣa maɣal mtzjul ʦ~ʨjuɣal ʦ~ʨintman. lizen ru nunmin maɣal mopuw ms~ɕpat ʦ~ʨintman.ɣiqas~ɕ ziraj tan maɣal mopuw ms~ɕpat ʦ~ʨintman .ħes~ɕjeʦ~ʨunzen maɣal mopuw mpitu ʦ~ʨintma. latoweja te qutux tan/ latoweja tuqi linħojan ms~ɕenkjo,puqiŋ ki zizju linħojan,ms~ɕqutux nqu s~ɕquliq na latoweja s~ɕquliq nqu kenlitan maɣal mopuw ʦ~ʨintman,maɣal ms~ɕpat ʦ~ʨintman ru maɣal mtzju ʦ~ʨintman .mins~ɕjutan,litan ru noɣjo linħojan,latoweja te qutux tan/ latoweja tuqi linħojan ru ʦ~ʨuko ki zizju linħojan ps~ɕrux mkrraw nqu s~ɕe*u.ajʦ~ʨjarls~ɕ.karlwetis~ɕs~ɕi s~ɕi nja ras~ɕi mtħoki kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mpitu kawas~ɕ mɣal βjaiŋ mtzjul rjax iħwe ms~ɕenkjo s~ɕoto.ʦ~ʨjarlʦ~ʨis~ɕ.ʦ~ʨatelajrls~ɕ maɣal s~ɕoto.maki s~ɕa te mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal nqu iħwe kajɣi.(kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mopuw s~ɕpat kawas~ɕ)kja ɣiqas~ɕ nqu paws~ɕotan(maɣal mopuw mtzju ʦ~ʨintman mitxal mzjup s~ɕa iħwe),*aʦ~ʨantan(maɣal mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal ʦ~ʨintman .mitxal mzjup s~ɕa iħwe),minʦ~ʨu linħojan(maɣal mopuw s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨintman)ms~ɕqutux linħojan,s~ɕpjaŋ ħantaj tan ru ħes~ɕetan(mpus~ɕal s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨintman). kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mqeru ru mpitu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qutux rjax. koka nqu latoweja mqas~ɕu mqeru ħopa nqu qalaŋ(ke nqu latoweja: pils~ɕ*ta)qutux kβħul ru mqeru nqu qalaŋ(no*a*s~ɕ).kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mpus~ɕal ru mtzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw rjax. s~ɕwalan nqu latoweja na iħwe mħa qalŋ nqu pkɣiqas~ɕ nqu zjuwaw.qutux kβħul ru mopouw nqu qalaŋ ru mqeru na ħopa qalaŋ βlequn nħa mwazjaw qu mmatul s~ɕaziŋ nqu qalaŋ s~ɕe*u la.mtzjul maɣal ɣa qalaŋ ru mpitu ɣa koka nqu ħopa qalaŋ .kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mpus~ɕal qutux mtzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qutux rjax. latoweja ɣaɣa nqu ħoin pins~ɕpŋan nħa maqalŋ nqu walakelija ni ms~ɕqun ki leʦ~ʨkezit qalaŋ ħmiriq ɣaɣa.nanu jas~ɕa latoweja iħwe pins~ɕpŋan tħʔjan walakelija qalaŋ te mpatul ʦ~ʨjuɣal nqu qalaŋ s~ɕe*u. tili/kian koka nqu latoweja maki polotiħaj nqu ħtɣan waɣi.maki s~ɕa tuŋo βʔnux.ɣluw nqu peo.kura ɣħjaq ɣa ʔmuβuj s~ɕa ajs~ɕanija.kura mkilux ɣa ʔmuβuj s~ɕa litawwan.te ħtɣan waɣi ɣa ʔmuβuj ʔros~ɕ.te ħtɣan waɣi ki kura mkilux ɣa ʔmuβuj s~ɕa mplquj ʔros~ɕ.qes~ɕ nqu koka qinrjuzjux nja ɣa qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mtzju pɣan s~ɕaziŋ koŋli s~ɕjaw nqu umi ɣaqinrjuħan nja ɣa maɣal kβħul mtzjul qutux koŋli.kwara qu qinrjuxan ɣa mkrroq.ħekiŋ kinwaɣiq ɣa ms~ɕpat pɣan mpitumi.mqas~ɕu maħa mpajat ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal ɣa maki s~ɕa qutux kβħul mpus~ɕal mi kinwiqan.kinnita ɣa mkrroq nqu rħjal.(ħtɣan waɣi ru βjaqan waɣi)ru βʔnux.s~ɕpjaŋ nqu lljuŋ ɣa kja tawʦ~ʨjawa, lljuŋ nqu lijelupe,ru lljuŋ nqu keja. ɣaɣa nqu qinnxan koka nqu latoweja ɣaɣa nqu qinnxan ru zjaw nqu kinβkis~ɕan pinqs~ɕjuɣan ɣa zmaɣal ɣaɣa qinnxan nqu qalaŋ:kurllaŋ,s~ɕemiʦ~ʨjalija,wezme,s~ɕajlonija ru lateʦ~ʨjarl.qutux qutux qalaŋ ɣaɣa nqu qinnxan nqu ke ɣa,ɣaɣa na qinnħan ru iniptnaq qu mnanak nja.zizju nqu kiniŋ pins~ɕrux mʦ~ʨjuɣal nqu ββiru ijat ɣiwan koka nqu latoweja ɣaɣa nqu qinnxan qalaŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qalaŋ ms~ɕqun ru ms~ɕqutux mrraw ms~ɕinqutux mβuʦ~ʨi nqu latoweja linħojan nqu koka.qani ɣa s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja ru s~ɕquliq nqu liwonijaz ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ nqu rħjal.maki s~ɕa ʔros~ɕtiko na tes~ɕka wajal nħa mqs~ɕjuɣaŋ mtβuʦ~ʨi nqu qalaŋ:qalaŋ kurllaŋ,qalaŋ wezeme ru qalaŋ weʦ~ʨjepus~ɕke.ks~ɕka ɣa qalaŋ kurllaŋ lmaħaŋ kurllaŋ.s~ɕemiʦ~ʨjalija ru zajlonija*qalaŋ wezeme lmaħaŋ wezeme(kinħaŋan nja ɣa qalaŋ ajs~ɕanija kura mkilux nqu qalaŋ)*qalaŋ weʦ~ʨjepus~ɕke lmaħaŋ lateʦ~ʨjarl. qalaŋ weʦ~ʨjepus~ɕke nqu latoweja ki wezme qalaŋ na latoweja ms~ɕqun s~ɕa kurlzme na qalaŋ.ps~ɕrux s~ɕa linħojan nqu latoweja koka.qalaŋ nqu ħopa ʦ~ʨjali ɣa aki puqiŋ ɣa ɣluw nqu qalaŋ wezme.ariŋ s~ɕqu te s~ɕaziŋ βaβaw pintriqan nqu s~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβwanan lɣa ru mħelow na maʦ~ʨi qu qinnxan lru qalaŋ liʦ~ʨja ru βiħ nqu qalaŋ wajal mzju s~ɕa βinaħ nqu kin wezme na llamu nqu mtβuʦ~ʨi nqu qalaŋ ini βalaj ptnaq la. pinʦ~ʨβaq koka nqu latoweja kja mtzjul qu waɣiq nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru.ks~ɕka nja ɣa mtzju ɣa mqβaq s~ɕa kinraral nqu rajɣaq waɣiq na pqwas~ɕan βiru.ks~ɕka nja ɣa s~ɕaziŋ ɣa s~ɕe*u njux ps~ɕrux nqu pqwas~ɕan.latoweja"waɣiq nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru na pintzjaw nqu ɣaɣa "te mpitu pins~ɕpuŋ.nanak latoweja pqwas~ɕan nqu kis~ɕat(wajal laxan)ru latoweja nqu ko*aŋ s~ɕijejuŋ kja qu koka na waɣiq nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru na nintman nħa.βinaħ nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa"minpos~ɕa nqu koli na pqwas~ɕan βiru la." (kja ħazi s~ɕquliq pins~ɕqunan nqu koka ps~ɕrux pqwas~ɕan βiru qani).koka nqu latoweja qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ ħopa nqu rajɣaq ɣa latoweja na rajɣaq.mqwas~ɕ ħopa nqu pqwas~ɕan ɣa maki qnaβuw nja.ana ɣa koka qani ɣa tkaħul nja s~ɕa kekaq nja ms~ɕina maɣal s~ɕa pila i mqwas~ɕ βiru.nanu jas~ɕa maki pins~ɕpuŋ nja pira mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa maki s~ɕqani mqwas~ɕ."kian nqupin kes~ɕan****"ini βiqi pila mqβaq.βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa waɣiq nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru ɣa maki s~ɕa ps~ɕms~ɕun nqu zjuwaw ɣa maki nanak qu kenli nħa s~ɕmpuŋ pila.nanu jas~ɕa pβiq pila.qnaβu nqu pila.pintħan nqu s~ɕins~ɕi ɣa waɣiq nqu pintzjaw nqu tħoki ps~ɕpuŋ kwara. nniqun koka nqu latoweja βlaq qu nniqun qani ɣa kaħul noɣjo ms~ɕqutux linħojan.s~ɕpjaŋ nniqun nħa ɣa llamu nqu ħi.njux maki s~ɕa s~ɕjaw nqu potiħaj qu koka nqu latoweja.nanu jas~ɕa ɣa qquliħ ɣa nniqun nħa krrjax. koka nqu latoweja nniqun nħa ɣa βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa s~ɕlaxan nqu liŋaj nqu koka jaŋ ʔros~ɕ,litawwan nqu koka. latoweja nniqun minnrwan nħa ka.βiru nqu ktan ɣa ktan krjax nqu rramat ɣa βqunʔlwaw jaŋ ŋiħi ɣipun,ʦ~ʨipoq muɣi,ħopa muɣi,ħopa nqu ramat paj,tmaɣo,βaziŋ| ru ħi s~ɕjam. koka nqu latoweja nqu nniqun krrjax ɣa qpriħ ɣa waɣiq βalaj ru ʦ~ʨipoq qu ʦ~ʨkaw nħa s~ɕs~ɕokan.βalit ru kinnalaj nqu ħwotwe s~ɕpjaŋ nniqun s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja. s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja ɣa mnβu s~ɕqu ajaŋ nqu s~ɕwanme(ke nqu eɣo ɣa:s~ɕorrel s~ɕoup)."rupjmaize"qutux ɣa kinnalaj nqu mqalux nqu muɣi mqalux nqu mepaw. s~ɕpjaŋ niqun nq koka nqu latoweja.s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja ɣa mnβu nqu puqiŋ βiru. βiru qani ɣa s~ɕquliq nqu latoweja s~ɕpjaŋ nβun nħa qwo.ħopa qalaŋ ɣa liʦ~ʨja kaħul s~ɕaziŋ .kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mopuw qutuxtariŋ maki s~ɕa maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ tms~ɕuqan ptzjaw qutux kawas~ɕ minqutux"s~ɕinqqas~ɕ latoweja nqu βiru na rjax".latoweja nqu βiru na rjax kaħul βinaħ nqu koka ru s~ɕmoja mnβu βiru nqu s~ɕquliq mwaħ mʔutuʔ s~ɕqani.kaħul ana inu nqu ʦ~ʨinβwanan nqu mopuw ms~ɕjaw nqu koβa na βiru. ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj nqu s~ɕquliq mwaħ mzuj s~ɕqani.liʦ~ʨjaħes~ɕjaŋz(ke nqu latoweja:r*ɣas~ɕ melnais~ɕ βalzams~ɕ)qani ɣa latoweja nqu qutux puqiŋ nqu llamu na qwo na nnβun minħtuw s~ɕa s~ɕpjaŋ ɣleŋ ɣa mis~ɕu na qutux s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ mpitu kβħul mzimal s~ɕaziŋ. ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu koka βinaħ ʦ~ʨun ħwa min ko maki s~ɕa qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mtzju mtzju min ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu koka nqu latoweja kintke ɣa teħuk s~ɕa kons~ɕ nqu ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw mins~ɕβlaq ana ɣa tariŋ s~ɕa βaβaw nqu kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mpatul lɣa latoweja qani ɣa qolaŋ nqu s~ɕulin nanu jas~ɕa tmas~ɕoq qu s~ɕaziŋ koka na pis~ɕraŋi la kwas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mpatul mqeru pɣan qutux lɣa koka nqu latoweja qani ɣa ms~ɕβlaq ki ʦ~ʨun ħwa zen min linħojan nqu koka la.ʦ~ʨun ħwa min ko min naki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan s~ɕaziŋ teħuk kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mpajat ki koka nqu latoweja ps~ɕrux ʦ~ʨun lin s~ɕe nqu pis~ɕraŋi.βanaw nqu tmas~ɕoq qu pis~ɕraŋi.s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa ana wajal mtalax ɣa. njux s~ɕi klokaħ s~ɕmruʔjaŋ nqu s~ɕmka na s~ɕe*u ms~ɕβlaq mppkal mrraw . .ʦ~ʨun ħwa min ko maki s~ɕa qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjali ps~ɕrux s~ɕa koka nqu latoweja qani ɣa tajpe rajħjo nqu lonħojan.βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa zjwaw nqu s~ɕulin qani ɣa .koka nqu latoweja qani ɣa jaqiħ nja qu s~ɕulin ħmiriq ɣaɣaʔ koka nqu latoweja mluw s~ɕa omon βlaq βalaj qu pinʦ~ʨjaɣan nħa ki ʔros~ɕ.ana ɣas~ɕinβlajan nqu ħetaj ɣa s~ɕtama s~ɕa peje ki amerika. lat*ia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na oʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa riɣa. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa raimon*s~ɕ **jonis~ɕ, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
